title: Confession (First Draft)
content:
Confession (First Draft)

Guys are gaming in the living room. The conversation between them has worn thin; they’re sorta just existing on the couch, staring at the TV blankly, their hands the most active and engaged parts of the body. Are they bored of one another or is something highly personal at stake? It’s hard to tell the difference in a gamer’s eye.

A tickle, or some throat disturbance, causes Mark to fudge up his leading high score as he attempts to conceal this funny business from the rest of the group.

Dan (O.S.)
Yesyesyesyesyes.

Enrique (O.S.)
(sotto voce)
You son of a bitch.

Mark
(almost asking a question)
I have a confession.

No one responds

Mark
Forget it.

Dan
A confession?

Hunter
Churches are still open.

Mark
Never mind.
